languages.text: "Да будет проклят Тразин и его сокровища". {n}Голос Себериана переполнен глухой скорбью. Предок с усилием распрямляет спину, стараясь придать себе хотя бы видимость уверенности.{/n} "Что мне делать, {name}? Я не могу оставить свою истинную дочь здесь. Но..." {n}Он замолкает, позволяя вам понять дальнейшее без лишних слов.{/n}

"May Trazyn and his treasures be cursed." {n}Seberian's voice is hollow with grief. The ancestor forces his back straight, attempting to project at least a semblance of confidence.{/n} "What am I to do, {name}? I cannot leave my true daughter here. But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}

Но..." {n}Он замолкает, позволяя вам понять дальнейшее без лишних слов.{/n}

But..." {n}He falls silent, allowing you to grasp the rest without further words.{/n}

But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}

languages.text: “愿特拉金和他的宝藏尽受诅咒。”{n}塞贝里安的声音空洞得只剩悲伤。你的先祖强逼自己挺直脊背，努力维持最后一丝体面。{/n}“我该怎么办，{name}？我不能把我的亲生女儿留在这里。可……”{n}他沉默了，让你去领会他无法言明之事。{/n}
languages.original_text: "May Trazyn and his treasures be cursed." {n}Seberian's voice is hollow with grief. The ancestor forces his back straight, attempting to project at least a semblance of confidence.{/n} "What am I to do, {name}? I cannot leave my true daughter here. But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “愿特拉金和他的宝藏尽受诅咒。”{n}塞贝里安的声音空洞得只剩悲伤。你的先祖强逼自己挺直脊背，努力维持最后一丝体面。{/n}“我该怎么办，{name}？我不能把我的亲生女儿留在这里。可……”{n}他沉默了，让你去领会他无法言明之事。{/n}

languages.text: «Malditos sean Trazyn y todos sus tesoros». {n}El pesar deja hueca la voz de Seberian. Tu antepasado se obliga a enderezarse, intentando proyectar un mínimo de confianza.{/n} «¿Qué hago, {name}? No puedo dejar aquí a mi verdadera hija, pero...». {n}Le fallan las palabras, dejando que interpretes aquello que no se atreve a decir.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May Trazyn and his treasures be cursed." {n}Seberian's voice is hollow with grief. The ancestor forces his back straight, attempting to project at least a semblance of confidence.{/n} "What am I to do, {name}? I cannot leave my true daughter here. But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Malditos sean Trazyn y todos sus tesoros». {n}El pesar deja hueca la voz de Seberian. Tu antepasado se obliga a enderezarse, intentando proyectar un mínimo de confianza.{/n} «¿Qué hago, {name}? No puedo dejar aquí a mi verdadera hija, pero...». {n}Le fallan las palabras, dejando que interpretes aquello que no se atreve a decir.{/n}

languages.text: « Maudits soient Trazyn et ses trésors. » {n}La voix de Seberian est déformée par le chagrin. Le vieil homme se force à se redresser, essayant de montrer un semblant d'assurance.{/n} « Que dois-je faire, {name} ? Je ne peux pas abandonner ma fille ici. Mais... » {n}Il s'interrompt, vous laissant saisir le sens des paroles qu'il ne peut prononcer.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May Trazyn and his treasures be cursed." {n}Seberian's voice is hollow with grief. The ancestor forces his back straight, attempting to project at least a semblance of confidence.{/n} "What am I to do, {name}? I cannot leave my true daughter here. But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Maudits soient Trazyn et ses trésors. » {n}La voix de Seberian est déformée par le chagrin. Le vieil homme se force à se redresser, essayant de montrer un semblant d'assurance.{/n} « Que dois-je faire, {name} ? Je ne peux pas abandonner ma fille ici. Mais... » {n}Il s'interrompt, vous laissant saisir le sens des paroles qu'il ne peut prononcer.{/n}

languages.text: "Trazyn'e ve hazinelerine lanet olsun." {n}Seberian'ın sesi, kederden boşalıyor. Atan, öz güvensizliğini biraz olsun gözden kaçırmak için sırtını dikleştirmeye çalışıyor.{/n} "Ne yapmalıyım {name}? Gerçek kızımı burada bırakamam. Fakat..." {n}Dile getiremediği şeyi anlaman için sessizliğe bürünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May Trazyn and his treasures be cursed." {n}Seberian's voice is hollow with grief. The ancestor forces his back straight, attempting to project at least a semblance of confidence.{/n} "What am I to do, {name}? I cannot leave my true daughter here. But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Trazyn'e ve hazinelerine lanet olsun." {n}Seberian'ın sesi, kederden boşalıyor. Atan, öz güvensizliğini biraz olsun gözden kaçırmak için sırtını dikleştirmeye çalışıyor.{/n} "Ne yapmalıyım {name}? Gerçek kızımı burada bırakamam. Fakat..." {n}Dile getiremediği şeyi anlaman için sessizliğe bürünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Verflucht sollen Trazyn und seine Schätze sein." {n}Seberians Stimme ist voller Trauer. Dein Ahnherr richtet sich auf und versucht, wenigstens einen Hauch von Zuversicht zu verströmen.{/n} "Was soll ich tun, {name}? Ich kann meine Tochter doch nicht hier lassen. Allerdings ..." {n}Er verstummt und lässt dich erahnen, was er nicht ausdrücken kann.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May Trazyn and his treasures be cursed." {n}Seberian's voice is hollow with grief. The ancestor forces his back straight, attempting to project at least a semblance of confidence.{/n} "What am I to do, {name}? I cannot leave my true daughter here. But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}

Dein Ahnherr richtet sich auf und versucht, wenigstens einen Hauch von Zuversicht zu verströmen.{/n} "Was soll ich tun, {name}? Ich kann meine Tochter doch nicht hier lassen. Allerdings ..." {n}Er verstummt und lässt dich erahnen, was er nicht ausdrücken kann.{/n}

languages.text: 「トラズンと彼の宝は呪われろ」{n}セベリアンの声は悲しみに満ちて虚ろだ。祖先が背筋を伸ばし、少なくとも自信の表れをしようと努めている。{/n}「どうすればいいんだ、{name}？本当の娘をここに残すわけにはいかない。でも…」{n}彼は沈黙し、彼が口にできないことを理解させる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "May Trazyn and his treasures be cursed." {n}Seberian's voice is hollow with grief. The ancestor forces his back straight, attempting to project at least a semblance of confidence.{/n} "What am I to do, {name}? I cannot leave my true daughter here. But..." {n}He falls silent, leaving you to grasp what he cannot give voice to.{/n}
